title: RM04 repair workflow YAML
objective:
Run script:"""
from pathlib import Path
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
changed=[]
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')
workflow.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
workflow.write_text('''name: governance-validation-ci

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - governance/**
      - .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml
  push:
    paths:
      - governance/**
      - .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-governance-contour:
    name: Validate governance contour
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Validate governance contour
        run: python governance/validation/validate_governance_contour.py
''',encoding='utf-8')
changed.append(str(workflow))
state=Path('governance/state/RM04_REPAIR_GOVERNANCE_WORKFLOW_YAML.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM04','trace_id':'rm04_repair_governance_workflow_yaml','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'problem':'RM02/RM03 screenshots show active governance-validation-ci.yml invalid after YAML content pattern handling','change':'rewrote workflow with explicit valid YAML, no empty path list items, jobs block present','utc_completed_at':datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),'next':'RM04B verify repaired workflow evidence'},ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+'\n',encoding='utf-8')
changed.append(str(state))
report=Path('governance/reports/RM04_REPAIR_GOVERNANCE_WORKFLOW_YAML.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# RM04 | Repair governance workflow YAML\n\nStatus: completed\n\n## Problem\nGitHub Actions showed `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml` as invalid: malformed `paths` content and missing required jobs parsing.\n\n## Change\nThe active workflow was rewritten as valid YAML with workflow_dispatch, pull_request and push triggers, non-empty paths entries, permissions, and validate-governance-contour job.\n\n## Release status\nRelease PASS is revoked/false until repaired workflow evidence is verified.\n\n## Next\nRM04B verify repaired workflow evidence.\n',encoding='utf-8')
changed.append(str(report))
ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    s=ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    marker='## RM04 completed | 2026-06-04'
    if marker not in s:
        ctx.write_text(s.rstrip()+'\n'+marker+'\nRepaired active governance-validation-ci.yml after GitHub Actions invalid workflow screenshot. Release PASS revoked/false until verification. Next: RM04B verify repaired workflow evidence. No issue comments.\n',encoding='utf-8')
        changed.append(str(ctx))
for item in changed:
